title: RCR Cristalleria Italiana S.p.a. Linie Melodia | Modern Glass Bitter and Spirits Glasses, 6 Crystal Glasses, 8 cl
features: Serve up striking Italian style and craftsmanship to any home, bar or dining table with this set of Melodia Shot Glasses from RCR.

Since 1967 RCR Crystal has dedicated itself to the pursuit of cutting-edge, high-performance glassware, all produced from the company's headquarters in the heart of Tuscany. The Melodia range follows in that proud tradition, adorned with a beautiful cut glass decoration that brings timeless elegance and sophistication to any surrounding.

Each piece in this collection has been crafted from RCR's special LUXION glass - an eco-friendly material that boasts exceptional clarity and shine, high resistance to shock and impact and perfect acoustics. LUXION has also been tested for over 4000 washes in professional dishwashers without even a hint of clouding, so you can be confident that these glasses will stand as a sparkling centrepiece in your glassware collection for years to come!
With a dedicated Customer Service Team committed to providing peace of mind from our door to yours.
description: RCR Cristalleria Italia Melodia Bitter Glasses An eternal line, soothing and versatile. It is the preferred table decoration of millions of consumers who can also introduce themselves to the Mixology world as a style icon. The purest raw materials make it one of the clearest crystal glazes with unique luster. Exceptionally break resistant and tested over 4,000 professional dishwasher uses. The cocktail glass is made of perfectly clear glass and has a height of 60 mm and a diameter of 52 mm. The 6-piece bitter glass set is ideal for enjoying and tasting different varieties of bitter and liqueurs as it allows you to optimally enjoy the intense aromas and flavors of each drink. In addition, with multiple glasses, you can create a real tasting experience where you can compare the aromas and sensations of each liquor. Made in Italy. A single production polo is located in Colle di Elsa Val d'Elsa, immersed in the greens of the Tuscan landscapes.
